General.Name: Chuan Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Chuan Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, provides general building and construction services in Singapore. It operates through Earthworks and Ancillary Services; General Construction Works; and Property Investment segments. The company offers earthworks and ancillary services, including land clearing, demolition, rock breaking, mass excavation, deep basement and foundation excavation, earth disposal, earth filling, and shore protection; and civil engineering works, such as road diversions, road reinstatements, overhead bridge, sewerage, drainage, pipe laying, and cable trench works. It also provides general construction work services comprising alteration and addition works, including interior works or works affecting building systems or components, such as structural works, additions of lifts, and reinforcement works, as well as construction of new buildings. In addition, the company is involved in the rental of construction and civil engineering machinery and equipment; and property leasing and management services. Chuan Holdings Limited was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in Singapore.
